title: Buggy Takes the Stage
description: On pages 15–17, this part develops the danger of Buggy’s crew and the unstable alliance between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THEY SAY SOME KIDS IN A VILLAGE MADE FUN OF HIS NOSE.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Buggy's cannons blew the village to SMITHERENS...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND WHAT'S MORE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'VE HEARD THAT BUGGY HAS MYSTERIOUS POWERS.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hmmm... I wonder why there's no one around here...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I told you! Every body ran away 'cause they're scared of buggy!!'!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: OH! SO YOU'RE LOOTING THE ABANDONED HOUSES?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Of course not! I Rob Pirates, not villagers!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm not some low-down looter!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU'RE GIVING ME A HEADACHE!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: TAKE IT EASY!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I've got to get a hundred million berries!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then I'm going to buy a certain village!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Buy a village?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: FOR A HUN- DRED MILLION BERRIES? THAT'S A LOT OF MONEY, EVEN FOR A GREAT PIRATE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'VE GOT A FLAN...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: See this?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I JUST STOLE IT. IT'S A MAP OF THE GRAND LINE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AFTER I STEAL BUGGY THE CLOWN'S TREASURE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...I'm going to head for the GRAND LINE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND THEN I'LL STEAL THE TREASURES OF EVEN BIGGER PIRATES!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHAT DO YOU THINK?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: TEAM UP WITH ME, AND YOU'LL MAKE A FORTUNE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: could use a tough guy like you.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WE'LL SPLIT THE LOOK, SO-SO!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you know anything about NAVI- GATING?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Of course I do!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'M THE BEST NAVIGATOR AROUND!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I LOVE THE SEA!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WOW! That's great!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WE'RE HEADED FOR THE GRAND LINE TOO!!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
